raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Late arrival reasons","name":"What's been causing your late arrivals to work recently?","description":"Explores the underlying reasons behind late arrivals, which could be linked to energy, routine, or external factors.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Workload assessment","name":"How manageable does your current workload feel day-to-day?","description":"Assesses if the workload is a contributing factor to stress or lateness.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Feedback received","name":"What feedback have you received recently that’s stuck with you?","description":"Surfaces any impactful feedback that might be affecting current mood or performance.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback given","name":"How have you been able to give feedback to others lately?","description":"Explores opportunities and experiences in giving feedback, reflecting on team dynamics and personal role.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager support needs","name":"What specific support would make a difference for you right now?","description":"Identifies any specific support needed from the manager to address current issues or improve performance.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Team dynamic","name":"What part of the team dynamic is working well for you?","description":"Identifies positive aspects of the team dynamic, which can highlight areas of strength or potential neglect.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Growth opportunities","name":"What area of your role are you looking to grow or stretch in next?","description":"Pinpoints areas where the individual feels they can stretch and grow, revealing engagement and growth opportunities.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Clarity on priorities","name":"Are your current priorities clear and aligned with team goals?","description":"Checks if the individual has clear and aligned priorities, impacting performance and focus.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Personal routine changes","name":"Have there been any changes to your routine outside of work recently?","description":"Explores personal changes that might impact energy or punctuality, providing context.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Engagement in projects","name":"Which project are you most engaged with right now, and why?","description":"Identifies projects that evoke strong engagement, revealing motivational drivers.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]}]}
